ModuleName: Pivot Tables, Dashboards, and Power Query in Excel

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: A structured outline of the module's learning topics spanning pivot table fundamentals, advanced techniques, dashboard building, interactivity, and Power Query, used by instructors to plan lessons and by learners to navigate the module's scope.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: An overview page listing and briefly describing all topics covered in the module — including pivot tables, dashboards, and Power Query — giving learners and instructors a structured roadmap of the module's content.

Artifacts.Name: Pivot_Tables_Dashboards_generated.pptx
Artifacts.Description: A slide deck covering how to create, customize, and use pivot tables, build interactive dashboards with slicers and charts, and automate data preparation with Power Query, intended for instructor-led presentations or learner self-study.

Artifacts.Name: Introduction to Pivot Tables
Artifacts.Description: A reading that introduces the fundamentals of pivot tables, explaining what they are, how to create and configure them, and how to use them to summarize and explore large datasets; learners read this before attempting hands-on pivot table tasks.

Artifacts.Name: Advanced Pivot Table Techniques
Artifacts.Description: A reading covering advanced pivot table features such as calculated fields, custom grouping, and advanced filtering, enabling learners to move beyond basic summarization and extract deeper insights from their data.

Artifacts.Name: Building Dynamic Dashboards
Artifacts.Description: A reading that guides learners through the process of designing and assembling a dynamic Excel dashboard, covering planning, layout, linking pivot tables and charts, and producing an interactive reporting tool for decision-makers.

Artifacts.Name: Dashboard Interactivity and Visual Design
Artifacts.Description: A reading focused on enhancing Excel dashboards with interactivity controls (such as slicers and timelines), consistent visual design, chart formatting, and layout discipline to create polished, user-friendly reporting tools.

Artifacts.Name: Introduction to Power Query
Artifacts.Description: A reading that introduces Power Query as an automated data preparation tool within Excel, explaining how to connect to data sources, load data, and begin cleaning and shaping it without manual copy-paste or fragile macros.

Artifacts.Name: Data Transformation with Power Query
Artifacts.Description: A reading covering practical Power Query data transformation techniques — including cleaning, reshaping, standardizing columns, and handling errors — to prepare raw real-world data for analysis with pivot tables and charts.

Artifacts.Name: Automating Refresh Workflows
Artifacts.Description: A reading explaining how to configure Excel and Power Query to automatically refresh data connections so that dashboards and reports stay current whenever source data changes, without requiring manual re-import or re-cleaning.

Artifacts.Name: Automating Refresh Workflows
Artifacts.Description: A reading explaining how to configure Excel and Power Query to automatically refresh data connections so that dashboards and reports stay current whenever source data changes, without requiring manual re-import or re-cleaning.

Artifacts.Name: Quiz Question Bank (20 questions)
Artifacts.Description: A 20-question bank assessing learners on pivot table concepts, data source requirements, calculated fields, grouping, and related Excel features, used by instructors to build quizzes or exams for the module.
